label: Lending & Deposits Ontology
notes: Volume XI breadth pack (ADR-0014). Operational ontology for the full lending-products and deposit-products families beyond the credit-union anchor (auto_loan, mortgage, savings, certificate live in ontology/credit_union.json and are not redefined here). Enriches Object Registry classes by schema_ref with relationships, lifecycle, KPIs, required documents, and connectors. Relationship targets are catalog schema_refs (closed graph). Connector keys are forward references into the Connector Registry (Volume IX); required_document and KPI keys are free-form. Anchor products (consumer_loan, heloc, commercial_mortgage, construction_loan, sba_loan, equipment_loan, commercial_loc, checking, money_market, business_checking, ira) are hand-authored in full; the remaining consumer and specialty products are drafted on the same schema.

ontologies.label: Consumer Loan (Unsecured Installment)
ontologies.notes: Closed-end unsecured installment credit to an individual; Reg Z closed-end disclosures apply.

ontologies.label: Personal Loan
ontologies.notes: Fixed-rate personal installment loan; distinguished from consumer_loan chiefly by product packaging/marketing.

ontologies.label: Home Equity Line of Credit (HELOC)
ontologies.notes: Open-end revolving credit secured by a junior lien on the borrower's residence; Reg Z open-end + RESPA/appraisal rules apply.

ontologies.label: Commercial Mortgage (CRE)
ontologies.notes: Term loan secured by income-producing commercial real estate; underwritten on property cash flow (DSCR) and sponsor strength.

ontologies.label: Construction Loan
ontologies.notes: Interest-only, draw-based facility funding vertical construction; converts to permanent financing at completion.

ontologies.label: Bridge Loan
ontologies.notes: Short-term interim financing pending permanent takeout or asset sale.

ontologies.label: Commercial Line of Credit
ontologies.notes: Revolving working-capital facility, often borrowing-base governed and secured by AR/inventory.

ontologies.label: Equipment Loan
ontologies.notes: Term loan to acquire business equipment, self-secured by the financed asset.

ontologies.label: SBA Loan (7(a) / 504)
ontologies.notes: Small-business loan partially guaranteed by the U.S. Small Business Administration; SBA SOP eligibility and forms apply.

relationships.description: SBA guarantees a portion (typically 50-85%) of the loan.

ontologies.label: USDA Loan (Rural Development / B&I)
ontologies.notes: USDA-guaranteed rural housing or business & industry loan.

ontologies.label: Participation Loan
ontologies.notes: A loan in which a lead institution sells fractional interests to participant institutions under a participation agreement.

ontologies.label: Syndicated Loan
ontologies.notes: Large facility arranged by an agent bank and funded by a syndicate of lenders under a common credit agreement.

ontologies.label: Warehouse Line
ontologies.notes: Short-term revolving facility funding mortgages between origination and sale into the secondary market.

ontologies.label: Private Credit Facility
ontologies.notes: Bilaterally or club-negotiated non-bank loan, typically from a private credit fund to a sponsor-owned borrower.

ontologies.label: Factoring
ontologies.notes: Purchase of a business's accounts receivable at a discount; advance plus reserve on collection.

ontologies.label: Invoice Financing
ontologies.notes: Advance against outstanding invoices where the borrower retains ownership of the receivable (vs. factoring's sale).

ontologies.label: Lease (Equipment / Capital)
ontologies.notes: Financing structured as a lease of an asset; capital vs. operating classification per ASC 842.

ontologies.label: Agricultural Loan
ontologies.notes: Operating or real-estate credit to farm/agribusiness borrowers; often FSA-guaranteed or Farm Credit sourced.

ontologies.label: Checking / Share Draft Account
ontologies.notes: Transaction (demand deposit / share draft) account; Reg DD, Reg E, and Reg CC apply.

ontologies.label: Money Market Account
ontologies.notes: Tiered-rate savings deposit with limited transactions; Reg DD disclosures apply.

ontologies.label: Business Checking
ontologies.notes: Commercial demand deposit account; often paired with treasury/analysis and earnings credit.

ontologies.label: IRA Deposit
ontologies.notes: Tax-advantaged retirement deposit (Traditional/Roth); IRS contribution and RMD rules apply.

ontologies.label: Sweep Account
ontologies.notes: Automated overnight movement of excess demand balances into an interest-bearing or investment vehicle.

ontologies.label: Escrow Deposit
ontologies.notes: Impound account holding third-party funds (taxes, insurance, earnest money); RESPA escrow rules apply for mortgages.

ontologies.label: Trust Deposit
ontologies.notes: Deposit held by an institution in a fiduciary capacity under a trust instrument.

ontologies.label: Custodial Deposit
ontologies.notes: Account held by a custodian for the benefit of another (e.g., UTMA/UGMA, HSA custodial, FBO).

ontologies.label: Brokered Deposit
ontologies.notes: Deposit placed by a broker/deposit network; FDIC brokered-deposit rules and liquidity treatment apply.
